title: Container cni files in /var/run/netns does not get removed after container is exited and removed normally
body:
version: podman-0-0.3.git367213a.fc27.x86_64
kernel: 4.14.18-300.fc27.x86_64

Steps to reproduce:

Before running container, the number of files in /var/run/netns are 34.
```
# ll /var/run/netns | wc -l
34


# ll /var/run/netns
total 0
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 11:29 cni-065884c4-4424-793a-9659-77ea1d28704f
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 13:20 cni-06c18b26-943b-b52c-5970-09d86d28c295
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 14:08 cni-0aa77ab4-7566-d28c-11b3-7f582357b08d
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 14:28 cni-0f6c92de-2a36-208b-0eb3-693348148f59
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 15:21 cni-165c3e15-be8e-7c49-175a-31ca9036af12
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 15:17 cni-220e90c6-eed1-99ab-8bd3-61c7fc7ac6dd
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 13:51 cni-277ac40f-2085-001b-7c2b-2ed6d7c361d7
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 15:02 cni-28669309-eef6-60b3-6b3b-4f994aef5a76
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 14:52 cni-328a7048-a0b7-888a-0b7e-515475834c2b
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 13:50 cni-379d67c7-4f77-e7d9-c4f7-1e3950b00853
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 13:54 cni-3a551ccb-0e37-dc78-c4ba-9329c51c8dc2
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 14:00 cni-444a4c59-70b3-74f0-b91c-dabd2b982d45
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 14:02 cni-4596a87b-457a-a567-ca71-0dfc39b23ca7
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 13:20 cni-45d0cbba-60d4-3b31-5753-050fd5307471
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 13:46 cni-6e3d6202-f537-623e-a5c8-d9322bfca153
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 11:27 cni-78da92c7-f764-78cd-86df-98f986277671
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 14:24 cni-79a5d21a-453d-9f79-e9e9-ea4625a781a8
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 15:16 cni-7ce733c1-eb68-8088-875e-7af1db954507
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 13:44 cni-826817cb-527b-b57b-083b-8552da4c4fd0
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 13:24 cni-8279ef3d-9d7b-27e0-a1af-4208e0907615
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 13:25 cni-82d115f0-8572-7abf-77f0-95df1abf6014
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 12:23 cni-839aea4b-7e65-9d5c-6bce-852651ad1a03
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 13:50 cni-85baff37-50b5-fd7d-c867-1cc04a6eaf4b
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 13:44 cni-a329d80f-5c55-5a54-6c84-ba4d8e330334
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 15:17 cni-ab5cc90d-88b3-6bf3-940a-8471201681f6
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 13:26 cni-b32aed57-d252-fed2-6d96-808682828f64
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 13:23 cni-be3e38ce-b1c9-adab-8b6a-d4a45d37979d
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 15:23 cni-bfa61a20-8349-a385-aa2c-316342c66603
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 13:00 cni-c5215b26-6454-ee39-5eb9-bade95368f72
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 14:13 cni-df2a3703-452b-6e9f-00a2-cd48dd5f05e7
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 14:42 cni-ea12677c-c407-d774-9d4e-7cd0f085ee83
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 13:47 cni-f6e846a6-ee4c-c6a8-c8e0-8c139ad492d2
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Feb 16 13:48 cni-fd666752-f089-e3e8-a8e5-85654b1e367c
```

Run a container and exit:
```
# podman run -ti alpine sh
/ # ps auxww
PID   USER     TIME   COMMAND
    1 root       0:00 sh
    6 root       0:00 ps auxww
/ # exit
```

Remove container:
```
# podman ps -a
CONTAINER ID   IMAGE    COMMAND   CREATED AT                      STATUS                      PORTS   NAMES
fdd89c5879c8   alpine   sh        2018-02-16 15:26:55 -0500 EST   Exited (0) 32 seconds ago           laughing_lamarr

# podman rm laughing_lamarr
fdd89c5879c85d6c9323fec9a8e866ee5fe70336cad86252955217ded4974219
```

File count in `/var/run/netns` grows from 34 to 35;
```
# ll /var/run/netns | wc -l
35
```

If the container is ran with `--rm` option and then exit the container, file count does not grow.

```
# ll /var/run/netns | wc -l
35

# podman run --rm -ti alpine sh
/ # ps auxw
PID   USER     TIME   COMMAND
    1 root       0:00 sh
    5 root       0:00 ps auxw
/ # exit

# ll /var/run/netns | wc -l
35
```

Which I guess the cni file gets removed with `--rm` option.

Let me know if any other information is required.

comments.body:
I think I fixed this.
```
# rpm -q podman
podman-0.2.1-1.git3723cec.fc27.x86_64
# ls -l /var/run/netns/
total 0
# podman run -ti fedora echo hello
hello
# ls -l /var/run/netns/
total 0
```

Hello @rhatdan 

I tested with new package and see it is fixed.

```
# podman version
Version:       0.2.1-dev
Go Version:    go1.9.3
OS/Arch:       linux/amd64

# podman run -ti alpine echo hello
hello

# ls -l /var/run/netns
total 0
```

Thanks
